title: Announcing our partnership with the Republic of Korea
description: Google DeepMind and Korea partner to accelerate scientific breakthroughs using frontier AI models

title: Decoupled DiLoCo: A new frontier for resilient, distributed AI training
Partnering with industry leaders to accelerate AI transformation
description: Google DeepMind partners with global consultancies to bring the power of frontier AI to organizations around the world.

title: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS: the next generation of expressive AI speech
description: Our newest audio model introduces granular audio tags that give you precise control to direct AI speech for expressive audio generation.

title: Gemini Robotics-ER 1.6: Powering real-world robotics tasks through enhanced embodied reasoning
description: Gemini Robotics ER 1.6: Enhancing spatial reasoning and multi-view understanding for autonomous robotics.

title: Gemma 4: Byte for byte, the most capable open models
description: Gemma 4: Our most intelligent open models to date, purpose-built for advanced reasoning and agentic workflows.

title: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live: Making audio AI more natural and reliable
description: Our latest voice model has improved precision and lower latency to make voice interactions more fluid, natural and precise.

title: Protecting people from harmful manipulation
description: Google DeepMind researches AI's harmful manipulation risks across areas like finance and health, leading to new safety measures.

title: Lyria 3 Pro: Create longer tracks in more
description: Introducing Lyria 3 Pro, which unlocks longer tracks with structural awareness. We’re also bringing Lyria to more Google products and surfaces.

title: Measuring progress toward AGI: A cognitive framework
description: We’re introducing a framework to measure progress toward AGI, and launching a Kaggle hackathon to build the relevant evaluations.

title: From games to biology and beyond: 10 years of AlphaGo’s impact
description: Ten years since AlphaGo, we explore how it is catalyzing scientific discovery and paving a path to AGI.

title: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite: Built for intelligence at scale
description: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite is our fastest and most cost-efficient Gemini 3 series model yet.

title: Nano Banana 2: Combining Pro capabilities with lightning-fast speed
description: Our latest image generation model offers advanced world knowledge, production ready specs, subject consistency and more, all at Flash speed.

title: Gemini 3.1 Pro: A smarter model for your most complex tasks
description: 3.1 Pro is designed for tasks where a simple answer isn’t enough.

title: A new way to express yourself: Gemini can now create music
description: The Gemini app now features our most advanced music generation model Lyria 3, empowering anyone to make 30-second tracks using text or images.

title: Accelerating discovery in India through AI-powered science and education
description: Google DeepMind brings National Partnerships for AI initiative to India, scaling AI for science and education

title: Gemini 3 Deep Think: Advancing science, research and engineering
description: Our most specialized reasoning mode is now updated to solve modern science, research and engineering challenges.

title: Accelerating Mathematical and Scientific Discovery with Gemini Deep Think
description: Research papers point to the growing impact of Deep Think across fields

title: Project Genie: Experimenting with infinite, interactive worlds
description: Google AI Ultra subscribers in the U.S. can try out Project Genie, an experimental research prototype that lets you create and explore worlds.

title: D4RT: Teaching AI to see the world in four dimensions
description: D4RT: Unified, efficient 4D reconstruction and tracking up to 300x faster than prior methods.
